# svelte-chop-chop

> A headless-first image cropping and editing SDK for Svelte 5. Zero dependencies beyond Svelte. Ships UI components, headless composables, a plugin system, and presets.

## Quick Start

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { Cropper } from 'svelte-chop-chop';
  import 'svelte-chop-chop/themes/default';
</script>

<Cropper src="/photo.jpg" aspectRatio={16 / 9} style="height: 400px;" />
```

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { ImageEditor } from 'svelte-chop-chop';
  import { pluginFilters } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/filters';
  import { pluginFinetune } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/finetune';
  import { pluginFrame } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/frame';
  import { pluginWatermark } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/watermark';
  import { pluginResize } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/resize';
  import 'svelte-chop-chop/themes/default';

  function handleExport(result: ExportResult) {
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(result.blob!);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'edited.jpg';
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }
</script>

<ImageEditor
  src="/photo.jpg"
  plugins={[pluginFilters(), pluginFinetune(), pluginFrame(), pluginWatermark(), pluginResize()]}
  onexport={handleExport}
  style="height: 500px;"
/>
```

## Package Exports

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `svelte-chop-chop` | Components, composables, core utilities, types |
| `svelte-chop-chop/headless` | `createCropper` composable for headless usage |
| `svelte-chop-chop/plugins` | All plugin factories + `FILTER_PRESETS` |
| `svelte-chop-chop/plugins/filters` | `pluginFilters` |
| `svelte-chop-chop/plugins/finetune` | `pluginFinetune` |
| `svelte-chop-chop/plugins/frame` | `pluginFrame` |
| `svelte-chop-chop/plugins/watermark` | `pluginWatermark` |
| `svelte-chop-chop/plugins/resize` | `pluginResize` |
| `svelte-chop-chop/presets` | `profilePicture`, `coverPhoto`, `productImage` |
| `svelte-chop-chop/themes/default` | Default CSS theme |
| `svelte-chop-chop/themes/dark` | Dark CSS theme |
| `svelte-chop-chop/themes/minimal` | Minimal CSS theme |

---

## Components

### Cropper

Lightweight cropping-only component.

```svelte
<Cropper
  src="/photo.jpg"
  aspectRatio={1}
  sizeConstraints={{ minWidth: 200, maxWidth: 1000 }}
  grid="rule-of-thirds"
  transitions={true}
  bind:coordinates
  onchange={(c) => console.log(c)}
  onready={() => console.log('loaded')}
  onerror={(e) => console.error(e)}
  style="height: 400px;"
/>
```

**Props:**

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `src` | `ImageSource` | — | Image URL, data URL, `File`, `Blob`, or `HTMLImageElement` |
| `aspectRatio` | `number \| { min?: number; max?: number } \| null` | `null` | Aspect ratio constraint. `null` = free |
| `sizeConstraints` | `SizeConstraints` | — | Min/max width/height in pixels |
| `cropOutsideImage` | `boolean` | `false` | Allow crop area outside image bounds |
| `initialCrop` | `Partial<Rect>` | — | Initial crop position/size |
| `grid` | `"none" \| "rule-of-thirds" \| "grid" \| "golden-ratio"` | `"rule-of-thirds"` | Grid overlay type |
| `gridOnlyActive` | `boolean` | `true` | Show grid only during interaction |
| `transitions` | `boolean` | `true` | Enable CSS transitions |
| `stencil` | `Component` | `CropStencil` | Custom stencil component |
| `stencilProps` | `Record<string, unknown>` | — | Props passed to stencil |
| `readOnly` | `boolean` | `false` | Disable interaction |
| `class` | `string` | `''` | CSS class on root element |
| `style` | `string` | `''` | Inline CSS on root element |

**Bindable values:**

| Binding | Type | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| `coordinates` | `CropCoordinates` | Current crop in normalized, pixel, and viewport spaces |
| `transforms` | `TransformState` | Current rotation, flip, zoom, pan |

**Events:**

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `onchange` | `(c: CropCoordinates) => void` | Fires on crop change |
| `onready` | `() => void` | Fires when image is loaded |
| `onerror` | `(e: Error) => void` | Fires on load error |

**Snippets (slots):**

| Snippet | Type | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| `overlay` | `Snippet<[StencilProps]>` | Custom overlay |
| `toolbar` | `Snippet<[CropperReturn]>` | Custom toolbar |
| `empty` | `Snippet` | Empty state |
| `loading` | `Snippet` | Loading state |
| `error` | `Snippet<[Error]>` | Error state |

### ImageEditor

Full-featured image editor with plugin-driven toolbar.

```svelte
<ImageEditor
  src="/photo.jpg"
  plugins={[pluginFilters(), pluginFinetune(), pluginFrame(), pluginWatermark(), pluginResize()]}
  aspectRatio={null}
  exportDefaults={{ format: 'image/webp', quality: 0.9 }}
  onexport={(result) => { /* ExportResult */ }}
  oncancel={() => { /* cancelled */ }}
  style="height: 500px;"
/>
```

**Props:**

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `src` | `ImageSource` | — | Image source |
| `plugins` | `ChopPlugin[]` | `[]` | Plugin instances |
| `aspectRatio` | `AspectRatio` | `null` | Initial crop aspect ratio |
| `aspectRatioPresets` | `AspectRatioPreset[]` | — | Aspect ratio selector options |
| `exportDefaults` | `ExportOptions` | — | Default export settings |
| `class` | `string` | `''` | CSS class |
| `style` | `string` | `''` | Inline CSS |

**Events:**

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `onexport` | `(result: ExportResult) => void` | Fires on export/save |
| `oncancel` | `() => void` | Fires on cancel/close |

### CircleStencil

Drop-in circular stencil (forces 1:1 aspect ratio).

```svelte
<Cropper src="/photo.jpg" stencil={CircleStencil} />
```

### CropStencil

Default rectangular stencil with 8 resize handles (4 if aspect ratio is fixed).

---

## Headless Composables

### createImageEditor

Full editor orchestrator — use this for complete custom UI.

```typescript
import { createImageEditor } from 'svelte-chop-chop';
import { pluginFilters } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/filters';

const editor = createImageEditor({
  plugins: [pluginFilters()],
  maxHistory: 50,
});

await editor.loadImage('/photo.jpg');
editor.applyFilter('clarendon');
editor.setFinetune('brightness', 20);
editor.rotate(90);
editor.flipX();
editor.undo();

const result = await editor.export({
  format: 'image/webp',
  quality: 0.9,
  maxWidth: 1920,
});
// result.blob, result.file, result.dataURL, result.canvas
// result.coordinates, result.transforms, result.originalSize
```

**Options:**

```typescript
{
  src?: ImageSource;
  initialCrop?: Partial<Rect>;
  initialTransforms?: Partial<TransformState>;
  aspectRatio?: AspectRatio;
  sizeConstraints?: SizeConstraints;
  maxHistory?: number;              // Default: 50
  exportDefaults?: Partial<ExportOptions>;
  plugins?: ChopPlugin[];
  readOnly?: boolean;               // Default: false
}
```

**Returned API:**

| Property / Method | Type | Description |
|-------------------|------|-------------|
| `image` | `LoadedImage \| null` | Loaded image |
| `loading` | `boolean` | Loading state |
| `error` | `Error \| null` | Load error |
| `ready` | `boolean` | Image loaded and ready |
| `crop` | `CropCoordinates` | Current crop coordinates |
| `transforms` | `TransformState` | Current transforms |
| `filters` | `FilterState` | Current filter state |
| `dirty` | `boolean` | Has unsaved changes |
| `canUndo` | `boolean` | Can undo |
| `canRedo` | `boolean` | Can redo |
| `actions` | `ToolbarAction[]` | Registered toolbar actions |
| `activeTab` | `string \| null` | Active panel name |
| `frameSettings` | `FrameSettings` | Frame settings |
| `watermarkSettings` | `WatermarkSettings` | Watermark settings |
| `filterPresets` | `FilterMatrix[]` | Available filter presets |
| `loadImage(src)` | `Promise<void>` | Load image |
| `setCrop(rect)` | `void` | Set crop |
| `setAspectRatio(ratio)` | `void` | Set aspect ratio |
| `fitToImage()` | `void` | Fit crop to image |
| `rotate(degrees)` | `void` | Rotate by degrees |
| `setRotation(degrees)` | `void` | Set exact rotation |
| `flipX()` | `void` | Flip horizontal |
| `flipY()` | `void` | Flip vertical |
| `setZoom(zoom)` | `void` | Set zoom |
| `zoomBy(delta)` | `void` | Zoom by delta |
| `center()` | `void` | Center image |
| `reset()` | `void` | Reset all |
| `applyFilter(name)` | `void` | Apply filter preset |
| `setFinetune(key, value)` | `void` | Set finetune value |
| `resetFilters()` | `void` | Reset filters |
| `undo()` | `void` | Undo |
| `redo()` | `void` | Redo |
| `export(options?)` | `Promise<ExportResult>` | Export image |
| `download(filename?, options?)` | `Promise<void>` | Download as file |
| `setFrame(settings)` | `void` | Update frame |
| `setWatermark(settings)` | `void` | Update watermark |
| `setActiveTab(tab)` | `void` | Set active panel |
| `on(event, handler)` | `() => void` | Subscribe to event, returns unsubscribe |
| `destroy()` | `void` | Clean up |

### createCropper

Lightweight headless cropper (no editor, no plugins).

```typescript
import { createCropper } from 'svelte-chop-chop/headless';

const cropper = createCropper({
  aspectRatio: 16 / 9,
  sizeConstraints: { minWidth: 200 },
});

await cropper.loadImage('/photo.jpg');
const result = await cropper.export({ format: 'image/jpeg', quality: 0.9 });
```

**Returned API:**

| Property / Method | Type | Description |
|-------------------|------|-------------|
| `image` | `LoadedImage \| null` | Loaded image |
| `loading` | `boolean` | Loading state |
| `error` | `Error \| null` | Load error |
| `ready` | `boolean` | Ready state |
| `crop` | `CropCoordinates` | Crop coordinates |
| `interacting` | `boolean` | User interacting |
| `stencilRect` | `Rect` | Stencil rectangle |
| `imageBounds` | `Rect` | Image bounds in viewport |
| `stencilProps` | `StencilProps` | Props for stencil component |
| `loadImage(src)` | `Promise<void>` | Load image |
| `setCrop(rect)` | `void` | Set crop |
| `setAspectRatio(ratio)` | `void` | Set aspect ratio |
| `reset()` | `void` | Fit crop to image |
| `export(options?)` | `Promise<ExportResult>` | Export |
| `destroy()` | `void` | Clean up |

---

## Plugins

Plugins add features to `ImageEditor` and `createImageEditor` via a setup function.

### pluginFilters

16 Instagram-style color filter presets.

```typescript
import { pluginFilters } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/filters';

const plugins = [pluginFilters()];
// Optional: pass custom presets
const plugins = [pluginFilters({ presets: myPresets })];
```

**Built-in presets:** none, clarendon, gingham, moon, lark, reyes, juno, slumber, crema, ludwig, aden, perpetua, vintage, chrome, fade, cool, warm.

Keyboard shortcut: `Ctrl+F` toggles filter panel.

### pluginFinetune

Brightness, contrast, saturation, exposure, temperature, clarity, and gamma sliders.

```typescript
import { pluginFinetune } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/finetune';

const plugins = [pluginFinetune()];
```

**Controls:** brightness (-100 to 100), contrast (-100 to 100), saturation (-100 to 100), exposure (-100 to 100), temperature (-100 to 100), clarity (0 to 100), gamma (0.1 to 5).

### pluginFrame

Decorative frame overlay applied at export.

```typescript
import { pluginFrame } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/frame';

const plugins = [pluginFrame()];
```

**Frame types:** none, solid, line, hook. Configurable width (1-80 px) and color.

### pluginWatermark

Text watermark overlay applied at export.

```typescript
import { pluginWatermark } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/watermark';

const plugins = [pluginWatermark()];
```

**Options:** text, position (9-point grid: top-left, top-center, top-right, center, bottom-left, bottom-center, bottom-right), opacity (0-1), fontSize (8-96 px), color.

### pluginResize

Output width/height controls.

```typescript
import { pluginResize } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/resize';

const plugins = [pluginResize()];
```

### Custom Plugin

```typescript
const myPlugin: ChopPlugin = {
  name: 'my-plugin',
  setup(ctx) {
    ctx.registerAction({
      id: 'my-action',
      label: 'My Action',
      icon: 'star',
      group: 'tabs',
      execute: () => ctx.showPanel('my-panel'),
    });

    ctx.registerShortcut({
      key: 'm',
      ctrl: true,
      action: () => { /* ... */ },
      label: 'My shortcut',
    });

    ctx.registerPostProcessor(async (drawCtx, canvas) => {
      // Draw on canvas at export time
    });

    ctx.registerFilterPresets([
      { name: 'custom', label: 'Custom', matrix: [/* 20 numbers */] },
    ]);

    const unsub = ctx.on('export:complete', (result) => {
      console.log('exported', result);
    });

    return () => unsub(); // cleanup
  },
};
```

---

## Presets

Pre-configured bundles for common use cases. Spread into component props or composable options.

```typescript
import { profilePicture, coverPhoto, productImage } from 'svelte-chop-chop/presets';
```

### profilePicture

1:1 aspect, 512px max, JPEG.

```svelte
<Cropper src="/photo.jpg" {...profilePicture} />
```

### coverPhoto

16:9 aspect, min 1200px wide, JPEG.

```svelte
<Cropper src="/photo.jpg" {...coverPhoto} />
```

### productImage

1:1 aspect, PNG.

```svelte
<Cropper src="/photo.jpg" {...productImage} />
```

---

## Types

### Core Geometry

```typescript
interface Point { x: number; y: number }
interface Size { width: number; height: number }
interface Rect { x: number; y: number; width: number; height: number }
```

### CropCoordinates

```typescript
interface CropCoordinates {
  normalized: Rect;  // 0–1 relative to original image
  pixels: Rect;      // Original image pixels
  viewport: Rect;    // Viewport coordinates
}
```

### TransformState

```typescript
interface TransformState {
  rotation: number;      // Degrees, 0–360
  flipX: boolean;
  flipY: boolean;
  zoom: number;          // Multiplier, default 1
  pan: Point;
}
```

### ImageSource

```typescript
type ImageSource = string | File | Blob | HTMLImageElement | HTMLCanvasElement;
```

### AspectRatio

```typescript
type AspectRatio = number | { min?: number; max?: number } | null;
```

### SizeConstraints

```typescript
interface SizeConstraints {
  minWidth?: number;
  maxWidth?: number;
  minHeight?: number;
  maxHeight?: number;
  minArea?: number;
}
```

### ExportOptions

```typescript
interface ExportOptions {
  format?: 'image/jpeg' | 'image/png' | 'image/webp';
  quality?: number;        // 0–1, default 0.92
  maxWidth?: number;
  maxHeight?: number;
  shape?: 'rect' | 'circle';  // Circle applies a circular mask with transparent corners
  postProcess?: (ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, canvas: HTMLCanvasElement) => void | Promise<void>;
}
```

### ExportResult

```typescript
interface ExportResult {
  canvas?: HTMLCanvasElement;
  blob?: Blob;
  file?: File;
  dataURL?: string;
  coordinates: CropCoordinates;
  transforms: TransformState;
  originalSize: { width: number; height: number };
}
```

### FilterState

```typescript
interface FilterState {
  preset: string | null;
  brightness: number;
  contrast: number;
  saturation: number;
  exposure: number;
  temperature: number;
  clarity: number;
  gamma: number;
}
```

### FilterMatrix

```typescript
interface FilterMatrix {
  name: string;
  label: string;
  matrix: number[];  // 20-number 5x4 color matrix
}
```

### FrameSettings

```typescript
interface FrameSettings {
  type: 'none' | 'solid' | 'line' | 'hook';
  color: string;
  width: number;
}
```

### WatermarkSettings

```typescript
interface WatermarkSettings {
  text: string;
  opacity: number;
  position: 'top-left' | 'top-center' | 'top-right' | 'center'
          | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-center' | 'bottom-right';
  color: string;
  fontSize: number;
}
```

### GridType

```typescript
type GridType = 'none' | 'rule-of-thirds' | 'grid' | 'golden-ratio';
```

### HandlePosition

```typescript
type HandlePosition = 'n' | 's' | 'e' | 'w' | 'nw' | 'ne' | 'sw' | 'se';
```

### StencilProps

```typescript
interface StencilProps {
  rect: Rect;
  aspectRatio: AspectRatio;
  active: boolean;
  imageBounds: Rect;
  grid: GridType;
  transitions: boolean;
}
```

### ChopPlugin

```typescript
interface ChopPlugin {
  name: string;
  setup: (ctx: PluginContext) => void | (() => void);
}

interface PluginContext {
  editor: ImageEditorReturn;
  registerAction(action: ToolbarAction): void;
  registerShortcut(shortcut: KeyboardShortcut): void;
  showPanel(name: string | null): void;
  registerPostProcessor(fn: ExportPostProcessor): void;
  registerFilterPresets(presets: FilterMatrix[]): void;
  on<T extends keyof EditorEvents>(event: T, handler: EditorEvents[T]): () => void;
}
```

### ToolbarAction

```typescript
interface ToolbarAction {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  icon?: string;
  group?: string;
  order?: number;
  disabled?: () => boolean;
  execute: () => void;
}
```

### KeyboardShortcut

```typescript
interface KeyboardShortcut {
  key: string;
  ctrl?: boolean;
  shift?: boolean;
  alt?: boolean;
  action: () => void;
  label?: string;
}
```

### EditorEvents

```typescript
interface EditorEvents {
  'image:load': (image: LoadedImage) => void;
  'image:error': (error: Error) => void;
  'crop:change': (coordinates: CropCoordinates) => void;
  'crop:start': () => void;
  'crop:end': () => void;
  'transform:change': (transforms: TransformState) => void;
  'filter:change': (filters: FilterState) => void;
  'history:change': (entry: HistoryEntry) => void;
  'export:start': () => void;
  'export:complete': (result: ExportResult) => void;
  'export:error': (error: Error) => void;
  'ready': () => void;
  'destroy': () => void;
}
```

---

## Keyboard Shortcuts

### ImageEditor

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `R` | Rotate 90° clockwise |
| `Shift+R` | Rotate 90° counter-clockwise |
| `H` | Flip horizontal |
| `V` | Flip vertical |
| `Ctrl+Z` | Undo |
| `Ctrl+Shift+Z` | Redo |
| `+` / `=` | Zoom in |
| `-` | Zoom out |
| `0` | Reset crop to image bounds |
| `Escape` | Reset all transforms |
| `Ctrl+F` | Toggle filters panel |

### Cropper

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| Arrow keys | Move crop 1px |
| `Shift+Arrow` | Move crop 10px |
| `0` | Reset crop to image bounds |

---

## Theming

Import one CSS theme and override CSS custom properties as needed.

```css
@import 'svelte-chop-chop/themes/default';
```

**CSS Custom Properties:**

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `--chop-bg` | Main background |
| `--chop-canvas-bg` | Canvas background |
| `--chop-color` | Text color |
| `--chop-border-radius` | Border radius |
| `--chop-stencil-border` | Stencil line color |
| `--chop-stencil-border-active` | Stencil active color |
| `--chop-grid-color` | Grid line color |
| `--chop-overlay` | Dimmed area overlay |
| `--chop-toolbar-bg` | Toolbar background |
| `--chop-toolbar-color` | Toolbar text color |
| `--chop-toolbar-active` | Active control color |
| `--chop-transition-duration` | Animation duration |
| `--chop-transition-easing` | Animation easing |

---

## Server Upload Example

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { ImageEditor } from 'svelte-chop-chop';
  import { pluginFilters } from 'svelte-chop-chop/plugins/filters';
  import 'svelte-chop-chop/themes/default';

  async function handleExport(result: ExportResult) {
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('image', result.blob!, 'photo.jpg');
    await fetch('/api/upload', { method: 'POST', body: formData });
  }
</script>

<ImageEditor
  src="/photo.jpg"
  plugins={[pluginFilters()]}
  onexport={handleExport}
/>
```
